name: Bunnygirl Transformation
description:
“Oh, but don’t you worry, Momma will take care of everything. Starting with slipping you into a cute little Bunnysuit and putting you to work~”

-Based off the wonderful work of JesscaTG on DeviantArt, if you like these sorts of things, I’m sure you’ll like her Art.(I have no affiliation, I just enjoy her work)

💖🐰💖🐰💖🐰💖🐰💖🐰💖

Everyone knows all gambling eventually ends in a loss, but it seems that lesson didn’t take with you, hm? Well, trying to win it all back just sunk you further into debt. But don’t worry, here at the Bunnygirl Casino, you’ll have the perfect opportunity to work all your debts off~
creator: 2Celeste
